pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies to this path. Validated by opentoonz_sample github repository.
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh configure and check this directory.
Task instructions and verifier.py enforce 1920. The original dwanko_run.tnz file has cameraRes 1920 1080.
Task instructions and verifier.py enforce 1080. The original dwanko_run.tnz file has cameraRes 1920 1080.
verifier.py uses file_count >= 10 as passing criteria. Original file has 72 frames.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official OpenToonz sample 'dwanko_run.tnz', which has a native camera resolution of 1920x1080 and contains 72 frames of animation. The expected output directory is /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/reflection. The verifier checks for a 1920x1080 resolution and at least 10 generated frames, ensuring top/bottom coverage and transparency differences.
